creator: jt@obs-sec.com
text:
Now that Lumina-Desktop is qt5 based, I have been slowly working to transition over to all qt5 based applications so that I can remove qt4 from my system completely.  

When qmmp was updated from 0.9.0 to 1.0.0, it was updated to the qt5 framework, it would be nice if this port was updated to the latest version.

After talking with Ken Moore at Ohio Linuxfest, he mentioned about him talking with Kris about changing the media player in PCBSD from smplayer to vlc so that the entire system would be qt5.  This request is being made in the same vein of thinking.
